title: ROYD-019 "I'm Sorry... I Was Feeling Lonely, So I Decided To Cum Over..." My C***dhood Friend Was In Love With Me, And One Day, She Was Caught In A Sudden Rainstorm, And Showed Up At My Door, Dripping Wet. Runa Kokomi - Dont Be Fruitful
description: A childhood friend in the neighborhood who grew up playing with him from a young age. I was so close to him that I had never been aware of it as a woman. But one day I learned that she was moving. On that day, she was bold enough to say that she was making her last memories. And one day she left her hometown and tried to forget everything. When the intercom rang and the door was opened, she was soaked in the guerrilla rainstorm! I could see the wet and transparent underwear, and the feelings I had suppressed overflowed ...
